calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-02-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Judy Mak for Plaintiff/Respondent opposing party in pro per.
William Chan, witness on behalf of Judy Mak.
Downtown Auto Center for Defendant/Appellant Moving party in pro per represented by Roselio Ransel Gasca.
David Chiu, witness on behalf of Downtown Auto Center.

Hearing is held. Argued by both sides. The Court reviews previously submitted exhibits by plainitff. Plaintiff exhibits are retained.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument takes the matter under submission. Judge Pro Tem: Henry Shain, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D525)
